title: ArcCloseFilingReviewSubstrateAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by chain arc-close-filing-review T7 retrospective. Records the substrate audit findings against the chain's completion_condition items (a)-(h). Sister to the substrate-quartet audit events (Architecture / Telemetry / ReferenceResolution / MLCapability) — same Findings array shape with item/status/evidence/severity. The substrate proves itself self-hosting by recording its own closing audit through the same events.Emit path the meta-tool handlers use.

audit_doc.description: Path(s) to the design + retrospective docs the audit was keyed to. Convention: design doc + retrospective doc joined with ' + '.

summary.description: One-paragraph human-readable closure narrative referencing the per-item findings + the deferred items routed in the retrospective doc.

recommended_next_phase.description: Optional pointer at the next-chain target this audit recommends; for arc-close-filing-review the natural follow-on is the trained-classifier candidate plus the smart-snapshot-filter candidate, both gated on corpus volume.

findings.description: One entry per chain-completion-condition item. status discriminates pass / fail / partial / deferred.
